jobs.title: Driver  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Driver  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
Warm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.
Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.
Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.
Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.

## This is you
Natural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.
Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.
Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.
Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.
Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Front Office Agent (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAs a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.
This is youFoundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Driver  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
Warm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.
Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.
Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.
Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.

## This is you
Natural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.
Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.
Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.
Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.
Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

jobs.title: Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Snack & Beverage Management: You maintain an overview and continuously restock snacks and drinks in our newly created Mountainbike Lounge.
Inventory & Stock: You assist with receiving goods, organize incoming deliveries, and maintain order in the warehouse/storage room.
Support: Occasional assistance with organizational tasks in the back office.

## This is you
Proactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.
Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.
Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.
Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

                                    +41 81 836 80 55

jobs.title: Florist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
The Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.
Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).
Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.
Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.
Start Date: June 1st, 2026

## This is you
Foundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.
Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.
Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.
Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.
Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usResponsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.Organizing and advising on outdoor landscapingProper care of flowers and green plantsProcurement of all flowers, plants, and materialsConcept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget
This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.
This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.
Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).
Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.
Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.
Start Date: June 1st, 2026

## This is you
Foundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.
Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.
Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.
Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.
Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof

And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German

jobs.title: Florist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Responsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.
Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.
Organizing and advising on outdoor landscaping
Proper care of flowers and green plants
Procurement of all flowers, plants, and materials
Concept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget

## This is you
You have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)
With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotel
You are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usSnack & Beverage Management: You maintain an overview and continuously restock snacks and drinks in our newly created Mountainbike Lounge.Inventory & Stock: You assist with receiving goods, organize incoming deliveries, and maintain order in the warehouse/storage room.Support: Occasional assistance with organizational tasks in the back office.
This is youProactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

## This is what you move with us
Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique:Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people.
Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests.
Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront.
Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.
  Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.

As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew

We look forward to receiving your application!

jobs.title: Front Office Agent (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

                    100%

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Porter Tournant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usTransporting guest luggage during arrival and departureCleaning rooms and suites as well as public areasPerforming errands and snow removal in winterCareful handling and maintenance of machines and equipmentSupporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions
This is youProfessional experience in a similar position in luxury hotelsReliability and discretionPassion for service and enjoyment of teamworkMust have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languagesWell-groomed appearance
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Contact us
T: 
                                                                
                                    +41 81 836 80 55
                                
                                                                    

                                                                                                                                E: 
                                                                
                                    people@kulmgroup.com

descriptionByLocale.de:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
